title: LlpswLib
description: LLPSW’s mod library, including the original animation modules and octree modules
body:
LLPSW’s module library, including the original animation modules and octree modules。
- Animation module, featuring bone hierarchy masks (to assign animations to different bones), animation transition effects between frames, and more.
- The octree module divides the space and assigns entities to corresponding spatial nodes, thereby improving search efficiency.

Note that installing this module alone will have no effect. Its purpose is to provide technical support for other modules.

llpsw的模组库，包含动画模块、八叉树模块等：
- 动画模块具备骨骼层级管理功能（可用于将动画效果分配到不同的骨骼上）、帧与帧之间的动画过渡效果等特性。
- 八叉树模块将空间进行划分，并将各个实体分配到相应的空间节点中，从而提升了搜索效率。

注意，仅安装此模组不会有任何效果，此模组诞生的目的，是为了给其他模组提供技术上的支持
